title: centrosema latidens
intro: Centrosema latidens, also known as the "butterfly pea" or "winged bean", is a leguminous vine native to Australia and Southeast Asia. Traditionally, Centrosema latidens has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help to treat wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The plant is also believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Centrosema latidens is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
